widgetMappings.reviewNotes: Primary maintained React table for wide operations workspaces. Bulk selection is visible; keyboard sorting still needs implementation proof.
Narrow web carries the queue contract as cards, but loading and error states are still review work.
Rendered wide web command surface; disabled state requires visual review.
Mobile web action bar is contract-only until the responsive shell is implemented.
Drag/drop remains implementation-owned because this proof does not execute browser interactions.
Missing empty and error states are intentional design review gaps.
Live update visibility is modeled; behavioral live-region audit remains later work.
Maintained React dashboard summary card grid carries current open, critical, blocked, and SLA-risk counts.
Maintained React filter panel uses local mock data and proves search/priority filtering in source.
Settings are maintained React controls in this proof; persistence is out of scope.
Maintained React assignment panel guides bulk assignment with workload and capacity hints.
